title: Modules 1
description: Modules help organize code and control visibility. Items are private by default in Rust.
instructions: Fix the visibility of the function inside the module so it can be called from main.
hints: Items in a module are private by default.
Use the `pub` keyword to make items accessible outside the module.
explanation: By default, everything in a Rust module is private. The `pub` keyword makes items (functions, structs, enums, etc.) accessible from outside the module. This is Rust's way of encapsulation - you explicitly choose what is part of the public API.
